info.name: HealthStream RAG
info.description:
HIPAA-compliant RAG chatbot API for personal health data.

Set `base_url` to `http://localhost:8000` (local) or your API Gateway URL (AWS).
Set `patient_token` to a patient ID (e.g., `synthetic-patient-001`).

request.description: Verify the API is healthy and check which backends are active.
Ingest health documents. PHI is redacted before embedding. Patient ID comes from the Bearer token.
Query health data. Returns answer with citations and medical disclaimer.
HIPAA test: wrong patient should get 0 citations. Cross-patient data leakage is architecturally impossible.
Replace the question with your own query.
